name: codex-dev-squad
description: A GitHub-centered, Paper-powered AI software squad for planning, designing, building, testing, and releasing small production SaaS products.

interface.shortDescription: A role-based AI squad for production SaaS delivery.
interface.longDescription: Codex Dev Squad packages Research, PM, UI/UX, Frontend, Python Backend, QA, and DevOps operating procedures into one Codex plugin. It is designed around GitHub for roadmap/backlog/PR collaboration, Paper for UI/UX design handoff, Next.js for frontend work, FastAPI for Python backend work, Playwright/Pytest for QA, and Docker/GitHub Actions for releases.
defaultPrompt: Run Codex Dev Squad discovery for this SaaS idea and produce a product brief.
Turn this feature request into GitHub-ready user stories, UI needs, API contract, and QA criteria.
Use the Codex Dev Squad feature workflow to plan and build this production-ready feature.
